description_long: This is a modern, two-piece brown leather seating set consisting of a single-seat chaise lounge and a matching two-seat sofa. Both pieces feature gently curved backs and seats, with smooth, continuous lines and a minimalist silhouette. The upholstery is a rich, solid brown leather with subtle seam detailing, giving the set a sleek and contemporary appearance. The legs are thin, straight, and black, providing a slight elevation and a sense of lightness to the overall design. The backrests are moderately high and slightly reclined, offering ergonomic support without any visible tufting or decorative elements. The set is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern brown leather chaise and sofa set with smooth curves, minimalist design, and thin black legs. The upholstery is solid brown with subtle seam details and no visible decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the single-seat chaise and two-seat sofa, highlighting their curved backs, smooth brown leather upholstery, and thin black legs.
description_view_1: Side view of the chaise, emphasizing the gentle curve of the backrest and seat, as well as the slim profile and black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backs of both pieces and the uniform brown leather finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the chaise, again showing the curved backrest and seat, with the same slim black legs visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrests are moderately high, gently curved, and smoothly integrated with the seat, featuring no visible segmentation, tufting, or decorative elements. The design is minimalist and ergonomic, providing subtle lumbar support.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both pieces have low, integrated armrests that are formed by the upward curve of the seat sides, present on both left and right sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are thin, straight, and cylindrical, made of black metal with a matte finish. They are simple and unadorned, contributing to the modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid brown leather with a smooth texture and subtle seam lines, without any visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Both the chaise and sofa have attached seat and back cushions that are seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no loose or separate cushions visible. The cushions are uniform in size and follow the curved shape of the seating.
